ops.title: Track F: fusekit hard-cut + drain
ops.description: (1) Pin daemonkit; hard-delete proc/service/appgroup/version; rewire; SkewCheck → version.Check+bundle.ShortVersion; mountd serve loop untouched except byte-cap reader. (2) Drain: golden-bunny F2–F6 on drain.* (lease-fence yield, proxy fan-out, adoption, bridge relay, additive wire fields), F1 AssociatedBundleIdentifiers, pre-gate Health/Shutdown fix. (3) Release. C1 observability lands with cc-pool's Track P flip, never an isolated pin bump. First upgrade rides the old all-idle ladder.

ops.text: Golden wire bytes identical + full fusekit gate green after the hard cut
p6 VM scenarios green (coexist-basic, drain-busy, crash-old, crash-new, double-skew, bridge-handoff)
One observed live fusekit-holder cask upgrade with drain
